Hardik Pandya thanks girlfriend Mahieka Sharma after T20 WC glory
description: In an electrifying finale of the T20 2026 World Cup, India emerged victorious over New Zealand with a staggering 96-run lead. The crowd cheered wildly as Samson, Kishan, Bumrah, and Abhishek Sharma delivered standout performances. Amid the jubilant atmosphere, Hardik Pandya shared a heartfelt moment with his girlfriend, Mahieka Sharma, expressing gratitude for her unwavering support in his journey.

title: Bride jilts groom & walks off stage with boyfriend in Andhra Pradesh
description: A dramatic turn of events at an Andhra Pradesh wedding saw a bride abandon her groom mid-ceremony, declaring her love for another man. The shocking revelation brought the festivities to a standstill, leaving over 500 guests stunned. Police intervened to prevent a clash, and elders are now mediating a resolution between the families.

Spiritual school in Pune shut over alleged abuse, 47 taken to child-care homes
description: A spiritual education center in Alandi has been closed amidst serious allegations of misconduct involving minor girls and breaches of child protection laws. Authorities have moved 47 children, including four girls, to government shelters. Investigations revealed the center operated without proper permissions and did not meet essential hygiene and safety standards, leading to an urgent shutdown and a police probe.

description: India achieved a historic feat, retaining the ICC Men's T20 World Cup by defeating New Zealand by 96 runs. This marks their third title and first on home soil. Stellar batting performances, including Sanju Samson's 89, propelled India to a massive 255/5. A disciplined bowling attack then restricted New Zealand, securing a memorable victory.

description: We feel pain when actual investment experience falls short of expectations. But the pain recalibrates expectations. This can improve financial wellbeing.

title: Pre-okayed personal loans aid in emergency
description: Waiting for approval with no clarity on eligibility can compound anxiety. Pre-approved personal loans, in such scenarios, are of huge value, enabling faster access to credit without much documentation

title: Porting hospitalisation policy; if this, then that
description: Starting porting process 45 days before renewal date is a requirement from the insurers’ side; you have to start research earlier; renew old policy if needed, don’t cancel it till you get the new policy

title: Amazon sends letter to FCC saying: Reject application of Elon Musk's Spacex for Space data centers
description: Amazon's Leo has urged the FCC to reject SpaceX's ambitious one million-satellite proposal, citing a lack of critical orbital and RF data. Amazon argues the plan is speculative, lacks space safety details, and would take centuries to deploy, potentially monopolizing orbital resources. The filing questions the feasibility and intent behind SpaceX's massive constellation.

title: With professors missing, medical students turn to YouTube and coaching apps to fix learning gaps
‘Next bullet in your chest’: Live cartridge found on developer’s car in Mumbai extortion scare
description: A Mumbai developer received a death threat and a live bullet on his car, allegedly from gangster Chhota Shakeel's associates. The threats, demanding Rs 50 crore, are reportedly linked to a 12-acre redevelopment project in BKC. Police are investigating the fresh threat after the developer's protection was withdrawn.

title: NFL trade news: New England Patriots, Indianapolis Colts linked to $50M Cincinnati Bengals DE
description: Sports Illustrated’s Gilberto Manzano projects Cincinnati Bengals defensive end Trey Hendrickson for a three-year, $105M deal with the New England Patriots and Indianapolis Colts as potential landing spots. New England needs pass rush help for their quarterback Drake Maye. And Indianapolis seeks to improve their defense under former Cincinnati defensive coordinator Lou Anarumo.  The Colts may free up cap space by trading or releasing their wide receiver Michael Pittman Jr., who is in the final year of his three-year contract.

title: Groups representing 700,000 Amazon, Google, Microsoft workers urge firms to ‘do right’
description: Employees from major tech firms like Amazon, Google, and Microsoft are demanding their companies reject Pentagon contracts that compromise AI safety guardrails.  These workers are concerned about the potential for mass surveillance and AI-powered weaponry without human oversight, urging transparency and ethical practices.
